column1: # ESP-IDF partition table for the ESP32-S3 build of this firmware.
# Selected at flash time by the espflash runner in
# `.cargo/config.toml`. The C6 port will ship its own
# switch between them via the active board Cargo feature.
# Keep the `storage` row in sync with `FLASH_FS_START` /
# constants mirror the offset / size declared here.
# Layout targets a 32 MB flash chip:
